creator: nox@jelal.kn-bremen.de
text:
On Thu, Nov 16, 2006 at 09:09:21PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of emulators/qemu,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/105617 has just been submitted.
> [...]

Well you are not the first one to stumble over this, but its
all documented in the pkg-message:

...
- qemu now uses aio at least for ide dma, so if you get `Bad system call'
crashes that is because aio is not (kld)loaded.
...

 So I guess this one can be closed...

	Juergen
